metadata.description: Sanduq — a chest of shared AI-agent tooling: Claude Code plugins, skills, and Spec Kit extensions.

plugins.name: devtools
plugins.description: Developer productivity tools: GitHub PR review feedback handling, multi-stack coding-standards review, QA How-To-Test manual generation, and detailed PR/changelog plus feature-details generation.

plugins.name: illustration-tools
plugins.description: Generate polished architecture and process-flow diagrams as self-contained HTML+SVG files with built-in Copy, PNG, and PDF export.
